results.title: BCMC Board Gathers for May Meeting
results.description: WARREN, Ark. – The Bradley County Medical Center Board of Directors met for its monthly meeting on Thursday, May 28 inside the hospital’s conference room with improved volumes, financial reports, executive updates, purchases out of sales tax funds, and annual policy approvals among the topics on the agenda. Minutes from the previous meeting were approved... Read

results.title: Rockslide forces closure of Spray Lakes Road near Canmore
results.description: According to witnesses, the rockslide came down shortly before 5:30 p.m. on Monday (June 1), narrowly missing a car.

results.title: Seven dead after shootings across southeastern Iowa, police say
results.description: Seven people, including the suspected gunman, are dead after police say a domestic dispute sparked a deadly shooting spree in southeastern Iowa.

results.title: Toy Story 5 shows ‘terror’ of children’s screen addiction, says Tom Hanks
results.description: US actor Tom Hanks has said the latest Toy Story film highlights children's addiction to screens, an issue that he says strikes "terror in the heart".

results.title: LEGO releases 4 new Botanical sets, and they’re cheaper than you think
results.description: LEGO unveils four creative Botanical sets, including fungi and aquatic plants, expanding its adult-oriented collection.

results.title: Ministry calls for village protocol safeguards
results.description: The Ministry of iTaukei Affairs and the iTaukei Affairs Board are calling for safeguards to ensure village protocols are respected when health officials enforce new legislation. Acting Permanent Secretary for iTaukei Affairs Josefa Toganivalu says the ministry supports the proposed reforms to improve public health in rural communities. results.title: East side shooting
results.description: A 39-year-old was found dead in a minivan with a gunshot wound on Cleveland’s East Side Monday night.

results.title: Robot dogs, drones, and dozens of agencies: Inside the massive security operation for the FIFA World Cup in DFW
results.description: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 descends on the DFW metroplex, over 30 agencies, including the FBI, have ramped up security measures, utilizing drones and a robotic dog.

results.title: Alestorm sails the seven seas of silliness at the Commodore
Ex-East Haven substitute arrested, accused of inappropriate conduct with students
results.description: A substitute teacher at East Haven High School was arrested and is accused of communicating with students inappropriately, according to an arrest warrant.

results.title: Air Raid Sirens Sounded Across Kyiv As Russia Launches Major Attack
results.description: The latest assault comes amid an escalation in Russia's long-range strikes against Ukraine.
